title: jasminum hasseltianum
intro: Jasminum hasseltianum, also known as the Yellow Jasmine or Night-blooming Jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum hasseltianum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
